name: Hermes Agent
description: The AI agent that grows with you
compose:
name: slashnode-hermes-agent
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/getumbrel/hermes-agent-umbrel:v2026.6.19-1
    container_name: hermes-agent
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command:
      - gateway
      - run
    environment:
      HERMES_UID: '1000'
      HERMES_GID: '1000'
      HERMES_DASHBOARD: '1'
      HERMES_DASHBOARD_PORT: '18789'
      HERMES_DASHBOARD_INSECURE: '1'
      HERMES_TUI_DIR: /app/umbrel-tui
      HERMES_UPSTREAM_TUI_ENTRY: /opt/hermes/ui-tui/dist/entry.js
      HERMES_GATEWAY_BOOTSTRAP_STATE: running
    volumes:
      - web_data-hermes:/opt/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:18790:18789
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-hermes:
    name: slashnode-hermes-agent_web_data-hermes
